changelog: Added Active Alerts panel in globe view when Susp Overlay is active
Alert cards color coded — orange for Impossible Travel, yellow for Login Burst, red for Outside US
Alert cards show event type label, detail line, and time ago stamp
Legend panel matches alert card and globe marker colors
Travel arcs on globe changed to orange matching Impossible Travel color
Flat map clusters now use traffic light colors — cyan for clean, amber for mixed, red for suspicious
Globe markers updated — Outside US red, Impossible Travel orange, Login Burst yellow, success cyan
Color scheme consistent across globe, flat map, clusters, alert panel, and legend
Alert panel auto-shows and hides with globe and Susp Overlay toggles
Clicking an alert card opens the detail panel for that event
